description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin surrounded by a simple wooden fence and several stylized coniferous trees. The main structure features a gable roof with a small chimney and a front porch supported by posts. Adjacent to the cabin is a smaller open-sided shelter with a slanted roof, housing stacked firewood and barrels. The property is dotted with rocks and logs, and the yard is enclosed, creating a cozy, secluded atmosphere. Windows are small and rectangular, with a single main entrance door at the front. The overall scene evokes a peaceful woodland retreat, blending natural and built elements harmoniously.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, front porch, and fenced yard, surrounded by coniferous trees and a wood shelter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, adjacent wood shelter, and fenced yard with trees and rocks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabin, the porch roof, and a cluster of tall trees along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cabin, more trees, and the enclosed yard with visible logs and rocks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back porch steps, side of the cabin, and additional rocks and trees within the fence.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof on main cabin with moderate pitch and a small chimney; adjacent shelter has a single-pitch shed roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small rectangular windows, asymmetrically distributed on the front and sides of the cabin, with no visible grouping or pattern.
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, opening onto the porch.
